channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Ce chargeur 5-en-1 (45 W) à -23 % est l’accessoire ultime pour recharger tous vos appareils
item.description: On adore quand un accessoire du quotidien devient vraiment utile sans coûter un bras et en ce moment, c’est le cas avec l'Ugreen Zapix 45 W. C’est un petit chargeur compact qui est équipé de 5 ports, et dont le prix chute à 17 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Apple iOS 26.5 public beta is now available
item.description: Apple has released the first public beta for iOS 26.5, just a few days after the beta for developers came out. One of the biggest changes the new operating system brings is the “Suggested Places” feature in Apple Maps. It will show you trending places to visit, such as restaurants and other establishments, near your location or based on your search history. You can see Suggested Places when you tap on the search bar in the Maps app. iOS 26.5 beta also will also come with notifications that the company will be putting ads inside Maps. Apple confirmed in March that it was going to expand its ads...

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs chargeurs sans fil à induction pour smartphone en 2026 ?
item.description: La charge sans fil est désormais plus largement répandue pour les smartphones et les accessoires. Voici notre sélection des meilleurs chargeurs sans fil pour recharger tranquillement votre smartphone Android, votre iPhone ou encore vos écouteurs ou votre montre connectée.

item.title: The LG G6 OLED TV got a picture-changing firmware update before its release, so I tested it side-by-side with the G5 again — here's what happened
item.description: The G6 OLED got a picture tweak ahead of its launch, so here's the latest on how it performs

item.title: Korean startup backed by Samsung and Arm launches rack-sized inference monsters, claims "6x lower power consumption" and up to 75% cheaper acquisition cost compared to Nvidia
item.description: Rebellions launches rack-scale AI infrastructure systems, claiming lower power usage and costs, backed by $400 million pre-IPO funding.

item.title: Anthropic says Claude Code subscribers will need to pay extra for OpenClaw usage
item.description: It’s about to become more expensive for Claude Code subscribers to use Anthropic’s coding assistant with OpenClaw and other third-party tools.

item.title: The First ‘Maul: Shadow Lord’ Reactions Are Most Solid
item.description: If you've been hoping for Maul to get his moment in the sun, sounds like 'Maul: Shadow Lord' mostly delivers.

item.title: Strava runs are continuing to leak sensitive military information, with over 500 UK soldiers the latest to be exposed
item.description: We've got more cases of military personnel revealing a significant amount of information through the fitness app.

item.title: Beyond the 'dark showering' trend — these expert lighting tips will really help you get a better night's sleep
item.description: Bathing with the lights down can help you relax before bed, but what other tricks can you use to nod off faster and sleep more soundly?

item.title: It's no longer free to use Claude through third-party tools like OpenClaw
item.description: Anthropic is no longer offering a free ride for third-party apps using its Claude AI. Boris Cherny, Anthropic's creator and head of Claude Code, posted on X that Claude subscriptions will no longer cover using the AI agent for third-party tools, like OpenClaw, for free. As of 3PM ET on April 4, anyone using Claude through third-party apps or software will have to do so with an extra usage bundle or with a Claude API key, according to Cherny. Most of Claude's workload may come from simple user questions, but there are those who use the AI chatbot through OpenClaw, a free and open-source AI assi...

item.title: I tested Huion’s 24-inch 4K Kamvas Pro 24 — and its crisp, vibrant display and huge working area have totally changed my mind about massive-screened drawing tablets
item.description: With its massive drawing area and vibrant colors, the Huion Kamvas Pro 24 Gen 3 has converted me to the joys of huge drawing tablets.

item.title: The latest on the Artemis II mission to the moon, and more science stories
item.description: We got to share in a rare moment of collective awe this week as four astronauts blasted off toward the moon, beginning a 10-day journey that will take them farther from Earth than any humans have traveled in the last 50 years. It'll still be a little while before they reach their destination — the Orion spacecraft is expected to loop around the moon on Monday — but they've already seen some pretty incredible stuff on the way there. Here's the latest on the Artemis II mission, and other interesting science stories from this week. Artemis II crosses the halfway pointAfter years of planning, NASA...

item.title: Les 5 paramètres à activer sur Windows 11 pour optimiser le gaming
item.description: Windows 11 regorge d’options pensées pour améliorer les performances en jeu… mais encore faut-il savoir où les trouver. Que vous jouiez sur un PC fixe dédié au jeu, un PC portable ou même une console sous Windows comme la ROG Ally, ces cinq réglages essentiels peuvent faire une vraie différence en fluidité, en latence et en stabilité.
